Title: FactOrFake - AI Fact Checker

URL Source: https://checkthisfact.com/

Markdown Content:
👋 Hi! I'm a donation based AI fact-checker. Ask me to verify any claim, statement, or news you've heard!

Try: "Did X say..." or "Is it true that..."

## How We Work

### Built by Brothers, Powered by Community

Two brothers built this fact-checking tool for friends and family. What started as a simple project to help our loved ones navigate misinformation has grown into something we're excited to share with everyone. 

 This tool is **100% donation-based** and we rely entirely on users like you to keep it available.

**Just $1 powers ~30 fact-checks.** If this helped you, help us keep the truth accessible for everyone. 🙏

## How We Fact-Check

### Government Sources First

We prioritize official .gov websites, government agencies, and regulatory bodies for the most authoritative information.

### Academic & Research Institutions

We search .edu domains, research papers, and academic institutions for peer-reviewed and scholarly sources.

### Reputable News & Organizations

We cross-reference established news outlets, fact-checking organizations, and official institutional websites.

### Smart Source Filtering

Our AI automatically filters out social media, unreliable sources, and prioritizes credible, authoritative information.

### Multi-Source Verification

Every fact-check uses multiple independent sources to ensure accuracy and provide comprehensive verification.

### Real-Time Search

We perform live searches across the web to find the most current and relevant information for each query.

### Multi-Language Search

We search in multiple languages to gather international perspectives, ensuring a more comprehensive and globally-informed fact-check.

### Fight Misinformation

In today's information landscape, it's crucial to verify what you hear before sharing. Our AI helps you distinguish reliable information from misinformation, rumors, and fake news by searching only the most credible sources.
